loops.scope: continuity, proof gate, validator/healer, runtime truth, operator front door
packets, board/atlas, claim audit, migration hygiene, readiness calculation
project-output contract execution on explicitly admitted project roots only

anti_shadow_control_plane_rules: No strategic or startup doc may act as queue authority.
No operator-local helper may become sole adopted truth.
No pilot may become a second control plane.
No external Codex automation may mutate Athanor runtime truth.

projects.label: Empire of Broken Queens
projects.first_output_target: Reproducible scene pack or character bundle with manifest, workflow refs, and acceptance refs.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Restore the prior tenant bundle and invalidate the promoted candidate.
projects.next_tranche: Produce the first accepted EOQ scene pack now that the local Next.js toolchain builds cleanly in-workspace.

observed_baseline.detail: Current workspace `npm run build` passes after installing the local Next.js toolchain.

projects.label: LawnSignal
projects.first_output_target: One shipped nationwide web tranche under the existing build/test/e2e gate, then a governed mobile-shell tranche.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Revert the shipped tranche and restore the prior mobile shell state.
projects.next_tranche: Run LawnSignal's existing local verification gate against the current nationwide tranche, then stage the first governed output without overriding the repo's local product cadence.

observed_baseline.detail: LawnSignal is admitted into the governed safe surface and the current nationwide companion tranche now passes the full local gate: lint, typecheck, Vitest, engine tests, Next build, and Playwright smoke. Production deploy remains a separate approval boundary.

projects.label: Ulrich Energy Auditing Website
projects.first_output_target: One real business-facing site release on the live external website root.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Keep the live external root as delivery authority until a deliberate cutover exists; revert shipped tranche on failure.
projects.next_tranche: Ship one real business-facing release on the current live website root and keep the Athanor sibling as retired lineage unless a separate runtime retirement or cutover packet lands.

observed_baseline.detail: The external website app root now passes `npm run build`, `npm run type-check`, and `CI=1 npx jest --runInBand` after the root-scoping fix. A builder-intake contact tranche is staged as the next governed external output.

sibling_roots.reason: Retain the Athanor sibling only as runtime lineage and rollback evidence until an explicit Workshop runtime retirement or cutover packet lands.

projects.label: Field Inspect
projects.first_output_target: One shipped owner-facing workflow tranche from the live product queue.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Field Inspect remains external implementation authority until explicit admission; revert bounded tranche on failure.
projects.next_tranche: Create an explicit project-output contract and widen safe-surface only if Shaun intentionally admits this repo.

observed_baseline.detail: Current workspace build probe fails at missing `prisma` CLI resolution.

projects.label: Medication Tracker
projects.first_output_target: One useful medication PWA tranche, then a decision on real Android promotion.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Revert the accepted PWA tranche if it fails utility or verification.
projects.next_tranche: Clean the canonical root and ship one useful PWA deliverable before any Android claim.

observed_baseline.detail: Static PWA baseline with a dirty authority root.

projects.label: Mood Tracking
projects.first_output_target: One useful mood-tracking PWA tranche, then a decision on real Android promotion.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Revert the accepted PWA tranche if it fails utility or verification.
projects.next_tranche: Ship one useful PWA tranche before deciding whether Android promotion is justified.

observed_baseline.detail: Runnable web baseline with a clean root.

projects.label: Cannabis Journal and Rating
projects.first_output_target: One canonical journal/rating PWA tranche, then a decision on real Android promotion.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Revert the accepted tranche and keep the sibling repo reference-only if no merge path is chosen.
projects.next_tranche: Keep Reverie canonical, clean the root, and resolve the sibling repo into merge-or-reference-only posture.

observed_baseline.detail: Runnable web baseline with a duplicate sibling repo and a dirty authority root.

sibling_roots.reason: Duplicate family root; keep reference-only until an explicit merge or promotion decision lands.

projects.label: Food Truck Finder
projects.first_output_target: One canonical consumer food-truck PWA tranche, then a decision on Android or broader platform promotion.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Revert the accepted tranche; keep the broader platform lane subordinate until explicitly promoted.
projects.next_tranche: Treat the consumer root as canonical and keep the broader platform lane subordinate until explicitly promoted.

observed_baseline.detail: Runnable consumer web baseline; broader sibling platform lane also exists.

sibling_roots.reason: Broader platform line; keep subordinate to the canonical consumer product until explicitly promoted.

projects.label: Buffalo Wild Wings Rating by Location by Meal
projects.first_output_target: One canonical Buffalo rating/review history PWA tranche, then a decision on Android promotion.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Revert the accepted tranche and keep sibling references non-authoritative.
projects.next_tranche: Keep Buffalog canonical, resolve the sibling repo to reference-only or archive, and ship one useful PWA tranche.

observed_baseline.detail: Runnable web baseline with a duplicate sibling and a dirty authority root.

sibling_roots.reason: Duplicate family root; keep reference-only unless explicitly promoted instead of Buffalog.

projects.label: To-do / Personal Almanac
projects.first_output_target: Create the canonical repository and first scaffold.
projects.rollback_or_archive_rule: Archive the scaffold if the slot is abandoned before product formation.
projects.next_tranche: Create the canonical root and project contract before any output claim.

observed_baseline.detail: No active canonical root was found during the portfolio audit.
